title: Pure classifySource() module (5 SRC kinds) + unit tests
action: Create templates/lib/source-identity.mjs (+ byte-mirror .bee/bin/lib/source-identity.mjs) exporting a PURE classifySource({ hiveDir, homeDir }) => { kind, root, markers }, kind in source_checkout|project_projection|plugin_package|legacy_global|unknown (SRC-01). Derive sourceRoot=dirname(hiveDir), pluginRoot=dirname(dirname(hiveDir)). Detection ORDER: (1) project_projection if basename(pluginRoot) is '.agents' or '.claude'; (2) legacy_global if realpathSync(sourceRoot)===realpathSync(join(homeDir,'.claude','skills')); (3) source_checkout if existsSync(pluginRoot/.claude-plugin/plugin.json) AND existsSync(pluginRoot/.git); (4) plugin_package if that plugin.json exists but no .git (SRC-03: never a global/plugin-target authority — record markers.can_target_global=false); (5) else unknown (SRC-04 fail-closed: missing/unparseable manifest or ambiguous). PURE: only read probes (existsSync/realpathSync/readFileSync), zero mutation, no throw on missing paths (guard realpath in try/catch -> unknown). Add unit tests to test_lib.mjs covering ALL 5 kinds on fixture trees incl a sentinel that MUST be unknown (TEST-01), and a purity assertion (fixture byte-hash unchanged after classify).

truths: classifySource returns the correct kind for each of the 5 fixtures (source_checkout via .git+plugin.json; project_projection via .agents AND .claude parents; plugin_package via plugin.json no .git; legacy_global via global-root realpath; unknown via no manifest)
a sentinel ambiguous/no-manifest tree classifies unknown (never a real kind) — fail-closed
classifySource is pure: performs zero mutation and never throws on missing/odd paths (returns unknown)
plugin_package records it is NOT a global/plugin-target authority (SRC-03)
templates/lib/source-identity.mjs == .bee/bin/lib/source-identity.mjs byte-identical; test_lib + full verify green
prohibitions: classifier must NOT mutate anything or throw (unknown on any probe failure)
do not let the mirror drift
do not change onboarding logic in this cell (module + tests only)

trace.outcome: Pure classifySource() shipped in templates/lib/source-identity.mjs (+mirror): classifies the running launcher into source_checkout/project_projection/plugin_package/legacy_global/unknown (SRC-01), fail-closed to unknown on any ambiguity/probe-failure/unparseable manifest (SRC-04), zero mutation, never throws. legacy_global checked before project_projection (realpath disambiguates the shared .claude grandparent). 7 unit tests across all 5 kinds + sentinel + purity, 302/0, full 13-suite green.
trace.verify_output: test_lib 302/0 incl 7 classifier tests (5 kinds + unparseable sentinel + never-throws + purity); test_lib_mirror 16 files byte-identical; full 13-suite chain green; manifest regenerated 34 files
